name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
ENVELOPE#Small Grain Embossed Quilted Leather Envelope Bag
Classic is eternal, stunning V-pattern combined with a quilted caviar texture. Italian ZP original cowhide paired with a striking YSL logo, combining atmosphere and fashion! In hand and it's ZP! Definitely take it to the counter to compare with the real thing!
Authentic...
Don't waste money! Buying from us is enough!
Model: 1754
Dimensions: 21x13x6cm
